---
name: Sorry Tracking
about: Track incomplete proofs and definitions
title: "[SORRY] "
labels: sorry-debt
assignees: ''

---

## Sorry Location

File: `spec/SWELib/...`
Line: (number)

## What's Missing

What proof or definition needs to be completed?

```lean
sorry  -- TODO: explain what's needed here
```

## Why Sorry?

Why is this incomplete?

- [ ] Unknown algorithm
- [ ] Complex proof
- [ ] Dependency on external work
- [ ] Low priority for MVP
- [ ] Other: (explain)

## Resolution Plan

How will this be resolved?

1. What needs to be researched/proven?
2. What's the estimated effort?
3. What blocks this?
4. Who will work on it?

## Definition of Done

When is this sorry resolved?

- [ ] Proof is complete
- [ ] Type checks
- [ ] Passes related tests
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Related Issues

Link to any related spec, bridge, or implementation issues.
